tasks.name: rtg_to_gcat_bcat_workflows_connectivity_tests
tasks.description: Validate RTG source-side handoff contract without falsely claiming external solver execution.

tasks.name: rtg_001_returned_artifact_ingestion_tests
tasks.description: Validate RTG returned-artifact ingestion using fixture or real ext2 artifact files.

tasks.name: rtg_001_state_update_from_ingestion_tests
tasks.description: Validate RTG state update from an artifact ingestion result while preserving claim and review boundaries.

tasks.name: rtg_001_next_instruction_selection_tests
tasks.description: Validate governed next-instruction selection after RTG state update.

tasks.name: rtg_001_review_packet_generation_tests
tasks.description: Validate final review candidate packet generation and lifecycle cost tracking.

tasks.name: rtg_001_final_review_candidate_tests
tasks.description: Validate final review candidate creation without claiming real artifact ingestion, final correctness, or autonomous proof.

tasks.name: rtg_001_real_evidence_normalization_tests
tasks.description: Validate real workflow evidence, preserve the EXT-002-FIXED to RTG-001 mismatch, and create a normalized ingestion candidate without false state-update claims.

tasks.name: rtg_001_crosswalk_approval_tests
tasks.description: Validate explicit crosswalk approval and wrapped real artifact receipt creation before RTG-001 real ingestion.

tasks.name: rtg_001_wrapped_real_artifact_ingestion_tests
tasks.description: Validate real RTG-001 artifact ingestion through approved crosswalk while preserving original run id and cost receipt.

tasks.name: rtg_001_real_artifact_state_update_tests
tasks.description: Validate RTG state update from real artifact ingestion while preserving cost receipt and blocking final claims.
